title: Support  - Poly Product Support screen color in light mode
scenario: Product Support link screen top box color mismatch with main body in light mode on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the device.
2. Ensure the app is in Light Mode (not Dark Mode).
3. From the Home screen, tap the Poly Lens Menu (hamburger menu icon).
6. Observe the top box on the Product Support screen.
expected: The top box on the Product Support screen should match the background color of the main body of the screen.
